key_points.text: Net income surged to $120,067 million in fiscal year 2026, more than 64% higher than the $72,880 million in fiscal year 2025
Q1 FY2027 net income of $58,321 million nearly tripled the $18,775 million in Q1 FY2026, demonstrating exceptional growth momentum
Aggressive capital return: $282 million shares repurchased for $40.4 billion in fiscal year 2026, with Board approval of additional $60.0 billion authorization in August 2025

citation.quote: In fiscal year 2026, we repurchased 282 million shares of our common stock for $40.4 billion. On August 26, 2025, our Board of Directors approved an additional $60.0 billion in share repurchase authorization

key_points.text: Substantial shareholder value initiatives: Q1 FY2027 repurchased 108 million shares for $20.2 billion, with Board approval of additional $80.0 billion authorization on May 18, 2026

citation.quote: We repurchased 108 million and 126 million shares of our common stock for $ 20.2 billion and $ 14.5 billion during the first quarter of fiscal years 2027 and 2026, respectively. On May 18, 2026, our Board of Directors approved an additional $ 80.0 billion in share repurchase authorization

key_points.text: Dividend significantly increased: Quarterly cash dividend raised from $0.01 per share to $0.25 per share effective for shareholders of record on June 4, 2026, representing a 25x increase

citation.quote: On May 18, 2026, we increased our quarterly cash dividend from $ 0.01 per share to $ 0.25 per share to all shareholders of record on June 4, 2026

key_points.text: Strong balance sheet: Total shareholders' equity increased to $195,474 million as of April 26, 2026 from $157,293 million as of January 25, 2026, reflecting robust profitability
Operating cash flow of $50,344 million in Q1 FY2027 significantly exceeded Q1 FY2026's $27,414 million, indicating strong cash generation

citation.quote: Net cash provided by operating activities 50,344 [Q1 FY2027] $ 27,414 [Q1 FY2026]
